summary: TTS | Navigation options in the middle right
description:
GIVEN TTS is enabled
AND the user is on the Following Teams page

steps.action: WHEN the user navigates to one of the following: CHC, CLE, HOU, LAD, MIN, PHI, SEA, TB
steps.result: THEN the app should say "The [focused_team] is highlighted. Press select to save this team as your follow team. Move left, down, or up to continue to highlight teams to follow. There is nothing selectable to the right.”
